prompt:
A close-up of the Completionist Award II trophy on a desk or shelf being carefully polished: a soft microfiber cloth is wrapped around part of the crystalline surface, with just a partial hand visible holding the cloth to avoid showing a full face. A small bottle of gentle cleaning solution and a folded spare cloth sit nearby, and the trophy’s facets catch the light, showing a few faint smudges disappearing where it is being cleaned.

Near-future solarpunk interior with warm, soft lighting and subtle background elements like plants or bookshelves. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or readable text on the bottle; the focus is on the act of caring for the trophy and keeping it shiny. The composition should immediately signal “polishing your prized award.”
